name: Loopy Claude
description: Autonomous coding orchestrator with 11 modes (plan, build, validate, reverse, work, audit, prime, bug, post-mortem, reconcile, wait). Includes Feature Designer skill with 3-phase workflow: Research → Requirements Loop → Cross-Spec Coherence → Crystallization. MIT licensed.
conditions: Add root SKILL.md (copy Feature Designer SKILL.md to repo root or create bundle index)
Add README.md explaining the project, loop.sh, and relation to .claude/skills/
Verify version info in all SKILL.md frontmatter
review: Contains genuinely high-quality content — the Feature Designer skill is one of the more thoughtful skills reviewed this cycle. Cross-spec coherence validation addresses real design drift. Published conditionally pending root SKILL.md and README.
